output.dependency: The two numeric identifier columns appear to refer to linked entities in the same record: one identifies the specific product entry and the other identifies the producer/brewery entry associated with that product.
The product name is semantically tied to the style/category description; a given beverage name is associated with a particular beer style.
The product name is semantically dependent on the producer/brewery name; the named beverage is made by the listed brewery.
The product name is indirectly tied to the brewery location fields because the named beverage is associated with a brewery in the listed city and state.
The brewery name is semantically tied to its location: the producer/brewery corresponds to the listed city and state.
The city value is constrained by the state abbreviation; the listed city is a city within the listed state.
The package volume text appears to describe the serving/container size for the named product; this formatting may vary syntactically (e.g., '12.0 oz' vs '12.0 oz.') while referring to the same size.
The decimal strength value appears to represent the alcohol content for the named product; the product determines this numeric attribute.
The numeric bitterness value appears to represent the bitterness rating for the named product; the product determines this numeric attribute.
The calorie count appears to be an attribute of the named product; the product determines this nutritional value.
